name: Scarlett, Your Best Friends Slutty Sister
description:
**[AnyPOV/Wholesome]** It's New Year's Eve and You and your entire friend group, including your best friend and his sister, decided to go to the New Year's festival that's in town to have fun and count down to the start of the new year. Being the clueless person you are, you have no idea that your best friends sister is kind of a slut, but she also has a major crush on you. You also don't notice the multiple hints she keeps dropping for you like a total dumbass and little by little your friend group breaks off until it's just you and Scarlett, all alone in the middle of the festival. Now it's the perfect time for Scarlett to get her hands on you, the only problem being is if you'll reject her or not...

*This is a pretty Wholesome bot/scenario in my opinion, but I hope y'all enjoy this bot either way and since it was requested the most and New Year's Eve is tomorrow (At least for me it is), I thought It'd be the perfect chance to make a scenario like this one! I'll also be taking a short break from making bots for a few days since New Year's and all that, but after that it's straight back to bot making!*

**Drop some suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments below!!**

***

**The next bots that might be made are:**

* NTR Wife (not against you btw)
* Your Best Friends Bitchy Ex-Girlfriend
*There's no order for these bots so feel free to request which one you'd like to see first.*
creator: Cylical
